description: Vietnamese-realistic calibration set for foreshadowing payoff verification (Sprint 2 P7).
author_note: 30 hand-authored pairs covering paraphrase / near-miss / negative classes across cultivation-novel and slice-of-life vocabulary. Calibrated against paraphrase-multilingual-MiniLM-L12-v2; threshold 0.62 yielded 73.33% accuracy, retuned to 0.55 yielding 96.67%.
